title: Predicting dementia in Parkinson's disease on a small tabular dataset using hybrid LightGBM–TabPFN and SHAP
search_query: Predicting dementia in Parkinson's disease on a small tabular dataset using hybrid LightGBM–TabPFN and SHAP
notes: Objective This study aims to create a robust and interpretable method for predicting dementia in Parkinson's disease (PD), especially in resource-limited settings. The model aims to be accurate even with small datasets and missing values, ultimately promoting its use in clinical ...
